rationale: In the citing paper, Thomas (2001) appears only once in an introductory grouped citation with Gupta et al. (2004) as an example of work on valuing individual customers in consumer settings. The paper does not discuss Thomas's acquisition-retention methodology, does not borrow its model or measures, and does not use it in hypothesis development or interpretation. Because the citation serves general background positioning rather than a distinct functional role, this is a passing mention.
